reviews.author: Chandra Sekhar
reviews.review_body: One of the top schools in the Nizampet region. Quality education is provided. Teachers continuously monitor the children's performance, and if they see any deviations, they inspire and focus the students. PTMs should be performed on a regular basis (once in after completion of every Term Exams). They will not put more stress on the youngsters by assigning more homework. Slip Tests, Class Tests, and Revision Tests are administered following the completion of each Chapter. Encourages youngsters to engage in competitive exams such as IMO, ISO, and IEO, as well as other activities such as interschool contests and science fairs. I personally suggest this school to anybody interested in providing great education to their children using the Play Way Method. Also, the cost structure is quite reasonable in comparison to other other schools in Nizampet.

reviews.author: Rayudu Sunitha
reviews.review_body:
As a parent, I cannot speak highly enough of Academic Heights Nizampet. The school's facilities are truly outstanding and have played a significant role in my child's academic success.
The classrooms are spacious and equipped with modern technology, making learning more interactive and engaging. The school's library and computer lab are also good and have helped my child develop a love for reading.
Overall, I am extremely happy with my decision to enroll my child in Academic Heights Nizampet. I  would highly recommend this school to any parent looking for a quality education and excellence.

reviews.author: madhu jayarapu
reviews.review_body: This school is best for the overall development of a child. They lay special emphasis on extra-curricular activities and provide a positive and healthy environment to study. The teachers are very experienced, qualified and student-friendly. The school has very good infrastructure with all the facilities. Academic heights is no 1 school in Nizampet.

reviews.author: maha laxmi
reviews.review_body: School aims at all round development, personality of its students. It attaches importance to outdoor as well as indoor games. The school campus supports sports. Best school in terms of education, extra curricular activities and parents cooperation. Academic Heights Public School, Nizampet is great going.

reviews.author: hari chakka
reviews.review_body: Academic Heights Public School is must recommended school in Nizampet....!! The faculty is excellent 👍🏼 Teachers gave special attention to each and every child in the classroom. School had a wide area indoor and outdoor also, children are allowed to take part in many curricular activities too. Very grateful for the rich learning environment. love this school, keep it up, good teachers - Good quality & high standards.
